source_lanes.title: Official Apple and MLX documentation

sample_targets.title: MLX documentation index
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Confirm supported MLX APIs and current behavior before promoting guidance.

sample_targets.title: MLX custom Metal kernels
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Check kernel API constraints, fallback expectations, and validation caveats.

sample_targets.title: Apple Metal developer documentation
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Verify Apple runtime and packaging constraints that affect custom kernels.

source_lanes.evidence_role: supported API, runtime behavior, packaging, and validation contract

source_lanes.title: Papers and technical reports

sample_targets.title: arXiv MLX framework search
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Find MLX-specific papers and separate claims from reproducible MLX evidence.

sample_targets.title: arXiv on-device transformer search
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Find architecture and metric gaps relevant to local Apple-silicon ports.

sample_targets.title: Papers with Code MLX search
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Identify paper-linked implementations that need source and license review.

source_lanes.evidence_role: architecture semantics, quality metrics, and algorithmic constraints

source_lanes.title: Hugging Face model and library metadata

sample_targets.title: Hugging Face MLX model search
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Sample model cards, task tags, licenses, library tags, and artifact shapes.

sample_targets.title: mlx-community organization
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Track common publication metadata and model families in MLX conversions.

sample_targets.title: Hugging Face Transformers MLX search
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Check current library surfaces before relying on ecosystem guidance.

source_lanes.evidence_role: model popularity, artifact shape, license, config, tokenizer, and task coverage

source_lanes.title: Package registries and release metadata

sample_targets.title: PyPI mlx metadata
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Capture current release metadata before changing base MLX guidance.

sample_targets.title: PyPI mlx-lm metadata
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Check CLI and converter package drift for language-model ports.

sample_targets.title: PyPI mlx-vlm metadata
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Check multimodal package drift and optional dependency surfaces.

sample_targets.title: PyPI mlx-audio metadata
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Check audio model package drift, quantization modes, and CLI surfaces.

source_lanes.evidence_role: install surfaces, version drift, dependency boundaries, and release cadence

source_lanes.title: Technical blogs and engineering reports

sample_targets.title: Apple Machine Learning Research
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Find Apple-authored implementation constraints or benchmark caveats.

sample_targets.title: MLX examples discussions and notes
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Find maintained examples that expose operational or benchmark details.

source_lanes.evidence_role: implementation details, benchmark caveats, and production constraints

source_lanes.title: Community discussions

sample_targets.title: Apple Developer Forums MLX search
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Collect pain points and leads without promoting them as supported guidance.

sample_targets.title: LocalLLaMA MLX search
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Sample user pain points, hardware caveats, and candidate follow-up repos.

source_lanes.evidence_role: pain points and candidate leads only; never sufficient for supported guidance

source_lanes.title: Repository source evidence

sample_targets.title: ml-explore/mlx
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Prefer official implementation and tests for supported MLX behavior.

sample_targets.title: ml-explore/mlx-lm
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Inspect official language-model conversion and serving patterns.

sample_targets.title: ml-explore/mlx-examples
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Inspect maintained examples for architecture and validation patterns.

source_lanes.evidence_role: implementation proof, tests, conversion scripts, and benchmark harnesses

source_lanes.title: Repo-local coverage audit

sample_targets.title: Research backlog
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Keep live research tied to current validated and unvalidated gaps.

sample_targets.title: Validation contract
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Check whether a finding has an existing pass/fail gate.

sample_targets.title: Tooling tests
sample_targets.sampling_goal: Find harness behavior that needs targeted regression tests.

source_lanes.evidence_role: coverage gaps, missing gates, and local validation debt

personas.title: Official Docs Cartographer
personas.mission: Find MLX or Apple-supported APIs, runtime constraints, packaging rules, and validation gates that should constrain porting guidance.

personas.title: Paper Architecture Scout
personas.mission: Find architecture-specific algorithm constraints and evaluation methods for model families the skill supports or should support.

personas.title: Hugging Face Ecosystem Sampler
personas.mission: Sample model cards, library tags, downloads, tasks, and license metadata to identify porting demand and artifact shapes.

personas.title: Package Registry Scout
personas.mission: Track packages and release metadata that change install, conversion, runtime, or optional dependency guidance.

personas.title: Practitioner Blog Miner
personas.mission: Mine implementation writeups and practitioner reports for leads while keeping unsupported claims out of supported guidance.

personas.title: Coverage Skeptic
personas.mission: Look for blind spots, unsupported architecture families, missing validation gates, and overclaimed optimizations.

decision_states.meaning: Evidence is strong enough to update a concrete skill asset, reference, test, or source record after validation.
Useful lead, but evidence is not sufficient for supported guidance.
Not relevant, unsafe, contradicted, or incompatible with source-preserving MLX porting.
Potentially important, but requires a local MLX path, parity test, benchmark, or license review before use.

review_policy.community_evidence_limit: Community discussions can identify leads but cannot by themselves justify supported guidance.
